name: Viper Inbound — Google Alerts RSS Pipeline

nodes.name: RSS Feed Trigger
nodes.notes: One trigger per RSS feed. Duplicate this node 25 times, one per Google Alert RSS URL from rss_feeds.json.

string.value2: (?i)(need|looking for|hire|budget|who can build|help me|recommend|want to|searching for|anyone know|can someone)

nodes.name: Shelby TG Alert
nodes.notes: Sends to Shelby webhook which formats the TG alert with suggested reply and BID/SKIP buttons.

_meta.description: Viper Inbound Engine — monitors 25 Google Alert RSS feeds for high-intent buyer signals, scores them, and sends Telegram alerts via Shelby.
setup_notes: 4. Duplicate the RSS trigger node for each of the 25 feeds
5. Connect all triggers to the merge node
